name: AgentScore

methods.name: create
methods.desc: Application creation — no-op; state initialised in __init__.

methods.name: setup_roles
methods.desc: Configure facilitator and dispute-resolver addresses (creator only).

methods.name: register_agent
methods.desc:
Opt the caller in, create a soulbound identity ASA, store
initial state, and return the new ASA ID.

methods.name: record_payment
methods.desc: Record a payment outcome for an agent (facilitator only).

methods.name: submit_rating
methods.desc: Submit a 1–5 peer rating for an agent.

methods.name: post_collateral
methods.desc: Accept a USDCa deposit (verified via preceding group txn).

methods.name: slash_collateral
methods.desc: Slash (confiscate) an agent's staked collateral (resolver only).

methods.name: get_agent_info
methods.desc: Return (score, alias, asa_id, trust_tier) for an agent.

desc:
AgentScore: on-chain reputation and credit scoring for AI agents.
    Implements soulbound identity ASAs, collateral staking, payment history
    tracking, peer ratings, and deterministic score computation.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Alias must be at least 1 byte
Asset receiver must be the application
Collateral payment txn must precede this call
Only dispute resolver can slash collateral
Transferred amount less than declared collateral
invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
